# CWE-306 — Missing Authentication for Critical Function (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-306-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Safe: requires authenticated operator before truncating ledger.
func PurgeLedger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	if r.Header.Get("X-Operator-ID") == "" {
		http.Error(w, "auth required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if db == nil {
		http.Error(w, "database unavailable", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("TRUNCATE ledger")
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"purged":true}`))
}
